name: Real Analysis — Limits & Continuity
description: Limit of sequence: a_n → L (ε-N definition). Limit of function: lim f(x) (ε-δ). Continuity at a point; uniform continuity. Bolzano-Weierstrass, Heine-Borel.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Sequence limit\na_n → L ε-N"]
    D2["Def: Function limit\nlim f ε-δ"]
    D3["Def: Continuity\nf cont at a"]
    D4["Def: Uniform continuity\nδ independent of x"]
    T1["Thm: Uniqueness\nof limit"]
    T2["Thm: BW\nbounded seq has conv subseq"]
    T3["Thm: Cont on [a,b]\n⇒ unif cont"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> D4
    D1 --> T1
    D1 --> T2
    D3 --> T3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3 theorem
